content_body: Just got back from Fallen Timber Lodge. I got together with 9 of my high school friends. I must say that the lodge is so beautiful and can accommodate a large group. It has a spectacular view, the beds are comfy, and there is a great kitchen. It also has a log burning fireplace with a gas starter. The fire was very easy to start and keep going. We had a blast in the hot tub, too. I would recommend this house to anybody. In fact, I am planning on going back next year with the same bunch of girls!
title: Great Girls' Weekend
